nonGoals: No callers wired up (UI integration is out of scope)
No new types or schema changes
objective: Implement and export getAttrDef(tagName, attrName) — case-insensitive attribute lookup on the existing SSML tag registry.
planText: Add the exported function `getAttrDef(tagName: string, attrName: string): SsmlAttrDef | undefined` to tags.ts after `getTagDef`. Delegate to `getTagDef` for case-insensitive tag resolution; on miss return `undefined`. On hit, do `def.attributes.find((a) => a.name.toLowerCase() === attrName.toLowerCase())` and return the result (the matched `SsmlAttrDef` or `undefined`). No caching, no other modules touched.

nonGoals: No changes to existing test cases outside the new describe block
objective: Add four vitest test cases covering known attribute, case-insensitive match, unknown tag, and known-tag/unknown-attribute for getAttrDef.
planText: In tags.test.ts, add `getAttrDef` to the existing import from `./tags`. Inside the top-level `describe('SSML Tag Registry', ...)`, add a nested `describe('getAttrDef', ...)` with four `it` cases: (a) `getAttrDef('break', 'time')` returns the correct `SsmlAttrDef` with `name: 'time'`; (b) `getAttrDef('BREAK', 'TIME')` returns the same result as the exact-case call; (c) `getAttrDef('nonexistent', 'time')` returns `undefined`; (d) `getAttrDef('break', 'nonexistent')` returns `undefined`. Use vitest assertions (`expect`). No other describe blocks or files modified.
